Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order And Motion To Quash As To Deft'S Subpoena To Education Management, Llc
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Richard Frischer of Lamb & Frischer Law Firm LLP telephone number 415-997-9529 for Plaintiff.
William Jemmott of Clasen. Raffalow & Rhodas telephone number 877-707-7992 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The Court adopted a modified tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF STEVEN NICHOLS' Motion For A Protective Order And Motion To Quash As To Defendant's Subpoena To Education Management, LLC is granted in part and denied in part (see order for full text). Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
